compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing test for llm_behavioral routing category
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Modify tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh to add llm_behavioral to EXPECTED_CATEGORIES and assert routing to dso:bot-psychologist

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file references llm_behavioral
  Verify: grep -q 'llm_behavioral' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh
- [ ] Tests for llm_behavioral fail (RED) because routing conf does not yet have llm_behavioral category
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0

## Implementation Notes
- Add llm_behavioral to EXPECTED_CATEGORIES array (8 total)
- Update comment from '# All 7 categories' to '# All 8 categories'
- Add test_llm_behavioral_routes_to_bot_psychologist asserting dso:bot-psychologist in routing chain
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Add .test-index entry mapping config/agent-routing.conf to tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh so the test gate enforces test passage when routing conf is modified.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh (modified), .test-index (modified), tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh (modified). Tests: 2 RED assertions fail, 14 existing pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED test for llm_behavioral routing category (2 assertions + .test-index entry)
